articles.headline: Agentic AI: the future of space warfare

articles.takeaway: Autonomous AI systems will replace human decision-making in space conflicts, making millisecond response times the decisive advantage in satellite warfare.

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational efficiency improvements across airline, airport, and airspace systems offer a faster near-term path to emission reductions than waiting for new aircraft technologies to mature.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts

articles.headline: The 12 Airlines That Still Operate 4-Engine Passenger Jets

articles.takeaway: Airlines operating quadjets face rising maintenance costs and fuel inefficiency, making their retirement accelerate as twin-engine alternatives dominate long-haul routes.
